data.content: Needs changes: 1. POST /api/beats unconditionally triggers the new scope-refinement path after create (src/app/api/beats/route.ts:85-91). 2. Because scope refinement is enabled by default and falls back to the generic dispatch default, existing installs auto-dispatch an agent without explicit opt-in (src/lib/schemas.ts:153-160 and src/lib/settings.ts:529-533 plus src/lib/settings.ts:598-615). 3. The create-route contract is not directly covered by a route/integration test.
